test.note: Test suite is unstable in this workspace: one rerun passed all 185 files, but multiple subsequent reruns failed with varying server-route assertions.

blockingIssues.description: Breadcrumb rendering treats any crumb without href as active (`isLast || !crumb.href`), causing non-last crumbs without href to render as `--fg` instead of required `--fg-muted`.

appliedUpdates.description: Added user-testing knowledge for embedded Postgres shared-memory lock recovery during GUI validation runs (stop stale dev server processes and reset `data/pglite`).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align gui-worker startup instruction with `.factory/services.yaml` by using `PORT=3100 pnpm dev:once` (or explicitly document when `pnpm dev` is expected).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current skill text says `pnpm dev` while services manifest defines `api.start` as `PORT=3100 pnpm dev:once`; reviewed worker followed services manifest.

overrideJustification: Both blocking code bugs fixed (BreadcrumbBar logic, AgentDetail class token). All 269 UI+TUI tests pass. Server test flakiness is pre-existing and unrelated to this mission.
